overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from GTA V showing a character walking along a Los Santos sidewalk at night. The character approaches an intersection, crosses as the traffic light changes, and continues through a residential area with graffiti-covered walls and street lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket ahead

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall with graffiti tags running along the right side of the sidewalk
wooden utility poles with multiple power lines stretching along the street
low-rise commercial buildings with illuminated windows and signage
vehicles parked along the curb on the left side of the street
tall street lamps casting yellow-orange light on the pavement
overhead traffic signal showing red lights at the approaching intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a nighttime walk along a city sidewalk in Los Santos. The camera follows a character walking past parked cars and commercial buildings on the left, with a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the right. Streetlights illuminate the path ahead toward a traffic intersection.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, allowing vehicles and pedestrians to proceed
passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the left side

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while the traffic signal is green

notable_agents.action: woman in black clothing walking toward the camera and passing by on the left

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the urban intersection as the traffic light changes from red to green. The scene opens up from the narrow sidewalk to the wider street crossing, with a pedestrian passing by in the opposite direction. The concrete wall continues on the right while the surroundings transition from commercial to residential buildings.

events.description: passes a pedestrian in a dress walking in the opposite direction on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past residential houses and street furniture

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: single-family homes and small apartment buildings with porches and windows
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the curb
black metal fence and gate entrance set into the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the residential sidewalk with the concrete wall now displaying prominent 'Los Santos' graffiti. The character passes a yellow fire hydrant and a metal fence entrance, with residential buildings lining the left side. Another pedestrian passes by as the walk continues into the distance under streetlights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime city sidewalk that transitions from a commercial district into a residential neighborhood. It begins by following a character past parked cars and commercial buildings, guided by streetlights and a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the right. As the character reaches a traffic intersection, the scene opens from the narrow walkway to a wider street crossing where the light shifts to green and a pedestrian passes in the opposite direction. The environment then shifts from commercial to residential architecture as the camera continues along the sidewalk, passing a yellow fire hydrant and a metal fence. Finally, the walk progresses further into the residential area under the glow of streetlights, with the concrete wall now displaying prominent Los Santos graffiti.
